title: BlockPartyGames
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37a374a0c23140554fcfceb45c6d42fde51e8205_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b594082a7cbf09ee2a12bf5c4f265d77cf9d2424_0.webp)
BlockParty is a minigame plugin for Spigot/Bukkit in which players race to the correct color on the dance floor in short rounds. Each round, everyone is assigned a random block/color; if you're not on that color after the countdown, you're eliminated. The last player standing wins.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36496d07fbff3f9bbfbee79ab5ac92414b5b0a2d_0.webp)
- **Arena Management**: Create and manage multiple game arenas with custom positions and spawn locations
- **Lobby System**: Dedicated waiting lobbies for each arena
- **Configurable Timers**: Progressive round timers that get faster as the game advances
- **Customizable Blocks**: Choose which blocks to use for the game floor
- **Scoreboard Integration**: Real-time scoreboard updates for waiting and in-game states
- **Stats Tracking**: Track player wins, losses, games played, rounds survived, and win rates
- **Sound Support**: Custom sound integration with ItemsAdder
- **Music Playback**: Continuous music track support with configurable duration
- **Join Signs**: Create interactive signs for easy arena joining
- **No Player Collision**: Players can't push each other during games
- **Inventory Management**: Automatic inventory saving and restoration
- **Message Customization**: Fully customizable messages and titles
- **Hub System**: Configurable hub location for players to return after games
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5641d186e2108781bc355a5942812b9d7c92c29_0.webp)
- blockparty.admin - Access to all BlockParty commands
- blockparty.play - Permission to join BlockParty games
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3210daf3b3e6447133568611ef7bbe8874e105a8_0.webp)
For questions you can contact me on discord: Dutchwilco or send a conversation. You can also join the discord server for comming updates or notifications when the plugin have new updates!
https://discord.gg/Sh3tCRn

How to install?
Stop your server and download the plugin!
Put the BlockParty plugin in your folder and start your server!
Now you can use the plugin!
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b73e77bbbeb227c948c1d780247e12d27f9b2ec5_0.webp)
